metadata.description: Valhalla: one-command autonomous SEO for a codebase. /valhalla perceives the project, decides which SEO disciplines apply, fans out specialists in parallel, and applies every relevant fix on a branch. 26 sub-skills (22 core + 1 orchestrator + 1 framework + 2 extension mirrors) and 18 sub-agents cover technical SEO, content, schema, sitemaps, Core Web Vitals, local, backlinks, AI/GEO, ecommerce, hreflang, SXO, drift, and Google APIs.
